title: After Netherite [Upgraded]
body:
After Netherite [Upgraded] is a mod from the _future_ trilogy of the "After Netherite" mods.

What it adds : 
- New netherite tier (upgraded netherite)
- New crafting recipes exactly like netherite does
- A vanilla experience to make the game easier in end-game, but longer and harder to complete

What v1.1 (last major update) adds :
- Reforged textures for a cleaner look

What v1.1.1 (last update) adds :
- Minor bug fix
- Made Upgraded Netherite tools  resistant to burning, like normal Netherite tools (armors may not be resistant to fire, i will fix that soon; Forge seems to refuse letting me do that tho).
- Nerfed armors knockback resistance from 0.2 to 0.15 (netherite is 0.1)

Made using MCreator by Lupus
To contact me add @lupussse on discord, i accept everyone;
if you want to create a mod and collaborate tell me !
